title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What, are claw machines your thing or
something? I don't think normal people can get
this many.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I would've been able to win any
plushies myself. You're really good at claw
machines, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No, sorry, what I mean is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Where should I put them? I should talk to Taiki
about these... Oh, I forgot to say something
important.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for getting these for me... I'll keep some
at my parents' house too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for winning these for me... I'll send
some to my parents too!
